mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_LOGIN_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NICKNAME, BIRTH, GENDER, ROLE, EXP, POINT, STATUS FROM LQ_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{value} AND UPPER(NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT USER_ID, USER_LOGIN_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NICKNAME, BIRTH, GENDER, ROLE, EXP, POINT, STATUS FROM LQ_USER WHERE UPPER(NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' AND NICKNAME = #{value}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_ID = #{value} AND STATUS = 'COMPLETED'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT QL.LOCATION_ID) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST UQ INNER JOIN LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS UQP ON UQP.USER_QUEST_ID = UQ.USER_QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION QL ON QL.QUEST_LOCATION_ID = UQP.QUEST_LOCATION_ID WHERE UQ.USER_ID = #{value} AND UQ.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND NVL(UQP.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_BADGE ( BADGE_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, CONDITION_TEXT, ICON_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_BADGE_PK.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{description}, #{conditionText}, #{iconUrl}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO LQ_USER_BADGE ( USER_BADGE_ID, USER_ID, BADGE_ID, EARNED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_USER_BADGE_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{badgeId}, SYSDATE )
